case_title: GREEN, TINA MARIE vs. FILTER, HELMUT et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-22-1996, CONTINUED TO AUG-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR FURTHER CASE STATUS REPORT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-22-1996, CONTINUED TO APR-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR UNINSURED MOTORIST STATUS REPORT. PLAINTIFF TO FILE DECLARATION DESCRIBING PROSECUTION OF UNINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM TO DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREEN, TINA MARIE
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-23-1996, CONTINUED TO NOV-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL OF UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DISCHARGED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREEN, TINA MARIE

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-23-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-23-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, AND AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE A DECLARATION DETAILING PROSECUTION OF UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM SEP-23-1996 TO OCT-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREEN, TINA MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT FILTER, HELMUT HEMENWAY, GARY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-06-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-10-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-17-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-23-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-23-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, AND AS TO WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO FILE A DECLARATION DETAILING PROSECTUTION OF UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE. HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ORDER OF DESIGNATION OF CASE AS UNINSURED MOTORIST FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREEN, TINA MARIE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-22-1996, CONTINUED TO JUL-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE A DECLARATION DESCRIBING ADDITIONAL PROSECUTION OF UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OBJECTION TO AWARD OF SANCTIONS IN THAT DECLARATION WAS FILED.
